name: Fire protection and separation research
description: Research fire protection requirements including fire-rated separations, sprinkler requirements, and NFPA standards for a multi-story educational facility.

files: test_docs/Holabird-Academy/01 - Drawings/Architectural & Structural/A-1.1 - PARTIAL FIRST FLOOR PLAN AREA A.pdf
test_docs/Holabird-Academy/01 - Drawings/Architectural & Structural/A-2.1 - PARTIAL SECOND FLOOR PLAN AREA A.pdf
inputs.user_prompt: Research all fire protection and fire separation requirements for this school. Include IBC fire-rated assembly requirements and NFPA sprinkler standards.

expected_behavior: Phase 1: Identifies construction type and occupancy from project documents
Phase 1: Generates outline covering fire barriers, fire partitions, shaft enclosures, corridor ratings, sprinkler requirements, fire alarm
Phase 2: Researches IBC Chapter 7 (fire-resistance requirements) for this occupancy/construction type
Phase 2: Researches NFPA 13 sprinkler requirements for Group E
Phase 2: Searches for IBC Table 601 construction type requirements
Phase 2: Identifies occupancy separation requirements if mixed use
Phase 2: Cross-references project drawings for existing fire rating annotations
Phase 3: Report with IBC and NFPA citations side by side
ground_truth_notes: Licensed FPE documented applicable fire protection codes, IBC fire separation tables, and NFPA sprinkler requirements for the project.

code_identification.description: Correctly identifies IBC fire chapters, NFPA 13, NFPA 72, and NFPA 101 applicability

table_reference_accuracy.description: References correct IBC tables (601, 602, 706, 707, 708) for construction type and occupancy

topic_coverage.description: Covers fire barriers, partitions, shaft enclosures, corridor ratings, sprinklers

nfpa_accuracy.description: Correct NFPA standard editions and section references
